welcome.title: Welcome {{name}} to Hosting!
welcome.description: This service is free if you already have a MiNET account with an active subscription. It allows you to create virtual machines and experiment with them.
welcome.limits: You have a maximum of <cores>{{cpu}} cores</cores>, <ram>{{ram}} GB of RAM</ram> and <disk>{{disk}} GB of disk</disk> to distribute across your machines.

create.name: Name
create.nameValidation: Letters, digits and hyphens only, starts with an alphanumeric character
create.errorCreating: An error occurred while creating the VM.
create.quotaExhaustedDesc: You have used all your allocated resources. Delete a VM to create a new one.

destroy.title: Delete <red>{{name}}</red>?
destroy.warning: This action is irreversible. The VM and all its data will be permanently deleted.

info.sharedVM: This VM has been shared with you

deprecated.banner: Your VM uses a deprecated template. We recommend recreating it with an up-to-date template. Resource modification and terminal are disabled.
deprecated.title: Deprecated template
deprecated.terminalDisabled: Terminal is disabled. Recreate your VM with an up-to-date template.
deprecated.resourcesDisabled: Not available with a deprecated template

console.adminRestriction: As an administrator, you cannot access the console of other users' VMs.

share.title: Share VM
share.findUserId: How to find a user's ID?
share.findUserIdDesc: Each MiNET member has a membership number visible on the Hosting home page, displayed next to their first name as <mono>#12345</mono>.
share.cannotModify: They cannot modify resources, access settings or delete the VM.

request.title: Make a request
request.alreadyHasIpv4: This VM already has an IPv4 address.
request.ipv4Pending: An IPv4 request is already pending.
request.dnsPending: A DNS request is already pending.
request.ipv4Desc: A public IPv4 address will be manually assigned by the MiNET team following your request.
